title: begonia tlapensis
intro: Begonia tlapensis, also known as the Tlapensis Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Begonia tlapensis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
